name: Brown Chili Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds chicken parts - necks and wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into small pieces (about 1-inch).
2. Heat a skillet over a moderate flame.
3. Add the chicken and brown well on all sides, turning as needed.
4. Remove the chicken with a slotted spoon and discard any excess fat.
5. Whisk the flour, cumin, garlic, and chile powder into the drippings.
6. Cook and stir for 2-3 minutes until smooth.
7. Add the remaining ingredients (chicken broth, tomato paste, and water) to the skillet.
8. Heat and stir over a moderate flame until the mixture boils.
9. Reduce heat and simmer for 30-40 minutes, stirring occasionally.
10. Strain through a chinois or cheesecloth, discarding solids.
11. Serve warm or at room temperature.
